audit_items.proof_trace: ucgendat.c is a standalone build-time code generator (has its own main() at L1902) that produces Unicode data tables during the OpenLDAP build; it is not compiled into the LDAP server runtime. While multiple malloc()/realloc() return values are unchecked before use (e.g., create_comps L1257, add_range L255, add_decomp L479, add_title L547, ordered_ccl_insert L676), these CWE-476 defects can only be triggered under OOM conditions during the build process. No LDAP network request can reach any of these functions, so the property's stated attack vector ('external-reachable via LDAP, attacker_controlled=true') is factually incorrect for this build tool.
